Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.BBOBFunction

Packages that use BBOBFunction
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Package containing the BBOB 2016 bi-objective test problems.

  • Uses of BBOBFunction in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016

    Subclasses of BBOBFunction in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AttractiveSector
    The Attractive Sector function.
    class 
    BBOBTransformation
    Abstract class for transformations provided by the BBOB test suite.
    class 
    DifferentPowers
    The Different Powers function.
    class 
    Ellipsoid
    The Ellipsoid function.
    class 
    Gallagher
    The 101-peak Gallagher function.
    class 
    Rastrigin
    The Rastrigin function.
    class 
    Rosenbrock
    The Rosenbrock function.
    class 
    Schaffers
    The Schaffers F7 function.
    class 
    Schwefel
    The Schwefel function.
    class 
    SharpRidge
    The Sharp Ridge function.
    class 
    Sphere
    The sphere function.
    class 
    TransformObjectiveOscillate
    Transformation that oscillates the objective values of the inner function.
    class 
    TransformObjectivePenalize
    Transformation that penalizes the objectives if the decision variables fall outside the region of interest.
    class 
    TransformObjectivePower
    Transformation that raises the objective value to the power of a given exponent.
    class 
    TransformObjectiveShift
    Transformation that offsets the value of the objective by a fixed amount.
    class 
    TransformVariablesAffine
    Performs an affine transformation of the form f(x) = Mx + b.
    class 
    TransformVariablesAsymmetric
    Transformation used to convert a symmetric to an asymmetric decision space.
    class 
    TransformVariablesBrs
    Transformation that skews or scales the decision variables using the same method described by the Buche-Rastrigin function.
    class 
    TransformVariablesConditioning
    Transformation that alters the condition number of the function.
    class 
    TransformVariablesOscillate
    Transformation that applies a monotone oscillation to the decision variables of the inner function.
    class 
    TransformVariablesScale
    Transformation that scales the decision variables by a given factor.
    class 
    TransformVariablesShift
    Transformation that shifts all decision variables by a given offset.
    class 
    TransformVariablesXHat
    The x-hat transformation, which negates some of the decision variables.
    class 
    TransformVariablesZHat
    The z-hat transformation used by the Schwefel function.

    Field
    Description

    The inner function that is being transformed.

    BBOB2016Problems.createInstance(int function, int dimension, int instance)

    Constructors in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016 with parameters of type BBOBFunction
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    BBOBTransformation(BBOBFunction function)
    Constructs a new instance of a BBOB test suite transformation.
     
    StackedProblem(BBOBFunction... functions)
    Constructs a new multiobjective problem from two or more single-objective functions.
     
    TransformObjectiveOscillate(BBOBFunction function)
    Constructs a new instance of the oscillation transformation.
     
    TransformObjectivePenalize(BBOBFunction function, double factor)
    Constructs a new instance of the penalty transformation.
     
    TransformObjectivePower(BBOBFunction function, double exponent)
    Constructs a new instance of the power transformation.
     
    TransformObjectiveShift(BBOBFunction function, double offset)
    Constructs a new instance of the shift objective transformation.
     
    TransformVariablesAffine(BBOBFunction function, double[][] M, double[] b)
    Constructs a new instance of the affine transformation.
     
    TransformVariablesAsymmetric(BBOBFunction function, double beta)
    Constructs a new instance of the asymmetric transformation.
     
    TransformVariablesBrs(BBOBFunction function)
    Constructs a new instance of the Buche-Rastrigin scaling transformation.
     
    TransformVariablesConditioning(BBOBFunction function, double alpha)
    Constructs a new instance of the conditioning transformation.
     
    TransformVariablesOscillate(BBOBFunction function)
    Constructs a new transformation that applies an oscillation to the decision variables.
     
    TransformVariablesScale(BBOBFunction function, double factor)
    Constructs a new transformation that scales the decision variables by a given factor.
     
    TransformVariablesShift(BBOBFunction function, double[] offset)
    Constructs a transformation that shifts all decision variables by a given offset.
     
    TransformVariablesXHat(BBOBFunction function, long seed)
    Constructs a new instance of the x-hat transformation.
     
    TransformVariablesZHat(BBOBFunction function, double[] xopt)
    Constructs a new instance of the z-hat transformation.
